title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.165 - Cause of action authorized
text:
347.165.  Cause of action authorized. — The secretary may bring an action to restrain a foreign limited liability company from transacting business in this state in violation of sections 347.010 to 347.187.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.812) 
Effective 12-01-93
